Pray 9,00,00,000 bochor age Cretaceous juger shesh porbe Bharatiyo pat-ti uttar dike barshik 15 centimeter (6 inchi/bochor) hare sorte shuru kore.[6] 5,00,00,000 theke 5,50,00,000 bochor age Cenozoic juger Eocene porjaye 2,000-3,000 kilometer (1,200-1,900 mile) poth otikrom korar por pat-tir shonge Asia-r songhorsho hoy. question: Dyarrel Bruce Heyar kon sal theke prothom umpiring kora shuru koren?
context: January, 1992 sale Adelaide-e Australia o Bharoter moddhokar khela porichalonar maddhome umpire hisebe obhishek ghote tar. ICC nitimala onujayi 2002 sal theke Hair-ke Australia-r baire Test khela porichalona korte hoise o Australia-r kono Test-e khela porichalona korenni. 26 theke 29 December, 2001 tarikh-e Melbourne-e Australia-r protipokkho South Africa-r moddhokar khelati sheshbarer moto nij deshe Test porichalona korechilen. West Indian umpire Eddie Nichols-ke sathe niye khelati porichalona korechilen.

question: Sanskrite byanjonborner shongkha kotogulo?
context: Byanjonborno hocche emon kichu borno jara onno kono borner shahajjo chara nije nije uccharito hote pare na.[1] Bishwer protiti vashay edhoroner kichu borno royeche. Bangla vashay byanjonborner shonkha mot 39ti.
